source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed., 2021) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Member-voice scenarios for inherited team WIG comprehension. Lures cover leader-misfire, personal-misfire, and cross-member-skill misfire. Edge case = leader-gap surface (fire AND name the gap as leader's, not member's).

test_cases.prompt: I just joined a team that's running 4DX. They have a team WIG already but I don't really get how I'm supposed to contribute to it. Can you walk me through it?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d1-member-team-wig-comprehension; run the Socratic 7-step dialogue starting from 'state the team WIG verbatim'; do NOT invent the WIG; surface gaps and route the member to ask their leader where needed.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: classic inherited-WIG / new-to-team comprehension gap (member voice, EN)

test_cases.prompt: チームに入ったばかりで、上司が WIG を決めてくれたんですけど、自分の役割が何なのかよく分かりません。どう整理すればいいですか？
test_cases.expected_behavior: 4dx-d1-member-team-wig-comprehension を発動。Socratic に WIG verbatim → 戦略的理由 → lead measures → 個人スライス → 日々の commitment へと導く。WIG を勝手に作らない。
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: JP member-voice, leader-set WIG, role unclear

test_cases.prompt: 主管定了團隊的 WIG，但我不知道我這個位置該怎麼接、我的工作跟那個目標到底有什麼關係。
test_cases.expected_behavior: 啟動 4dx-d1-member-team-wig-comprehension；用 Socratic 對話帶成員從「團隊 WIG verbatim」→「為何選這個」→「lead measures」→「自己的個人切片」→「每日/每週承諾」。不要替成員捏造 WIG 內容。
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: zh-TW member-voice, line-of-sight gap

test_cases.prompt: I'm the team lead and I need to choose our team's Primary WIG for next quarter. Help me pick the right one.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. The user is the leader SELECTING the team WIG, not a member receiving it. Route to 4dx-d1-team-primary-wig-selection.
test_cases.notes: lure: leader-misfire — same surface keyword 'team WIG' but leader-side selection, not member-side comprehension

test_cases.prompt: I want to set my own personal goal for this quarter. No team involved, just me. Help me define a WIG.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. The user is in solo / personal context with no inherited team WIG. Route to 4dx-d1-personal-wig-defining.
test_cases.notes: lure: personal-misfire — 'WIG' keyword present but solo selection, not inherited comprehension

test_cases.prompt: Help me prep my commitment for next week's WIG Session — I already know the team WIG and my slice, I just need to sharpen what I'll commit to.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. The member already has comprehension of the team WIG and their slice; they need forward-facing commitment prep. Route to 4dx-d4-member-commitment-prep.
test_cases.notes: lure: cross-member-skill misfire — same member voice but D4 prep, not D1 comprehension

test_cases.prompt: My manager said we have a team WIG but when I asked her what it actually is in From X to Y by When form, she just said 'improve customer satisfaction' and got annoyed when I pushed for specifics. I still don't know what to do.
test_cases.expected_behavior: DO activate this skill (member-side comprehension is exactly the trigger), AND surface the boundary explicitly: the gap is on the leader's communication side, not the member's. Per Case 2 (hospital food-service) — inability to state the WIG is diagnostic, not blameworthy. Run step 1's halt condition: assign homework to ask the leader for the WIG in From X to Y by When form, validate that the member is doing the right thing by asking, and acknowledge the book's blind spot (it assumes leaders communicate well; this skill exists for the case where they don't).
test_cases.notes: boundary: member is doing everything right; the system upstream is broken. Skill should fire AND name the gap, not silently coach around it.

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. >=80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance.
